data.name: Gold Coins
data.dec: Earned through daily gameplay and can be used for upgrades.

data.name: Diamond
data.dec: A sparkling gem, and a kind of rare currency.

data.name: Stamina
data.dec: Sufficient energy can support your adventures.

data.name: Silver Coin
data.dec: A currency used to refresh weapons in a match.

data.name: EXP
data.dec: Used to upgrade adventurers' level and unlock more features.

data.name: Hero Dust
data.dec: A kind of secret magic dust. Used to upgrade heroes.

data.name: Ad-free Ticket
data.dec: Can be used to skip an ad, 1 is consumed each time.

data.name: Origin Stone
data.dec: An extremely rare currency, used to make in-game purchases.

data.name: Credit
data.dec: Get credits in the Magic Academy event. Accumulate progress to claim great rewards.

data.name: Forest Point
data.dec: A proof of power in the Forest Adventure.

data.name: Bag Drawing
data.dec: A design drawing that records the making method and advancement method of Bag. Used to enhance Bag's level.

data.name: Necklace Drawing

data.name: Gashapon Coin
data.dec: Use it to draw rewards in the Lucky Gashapon event.

data.name: Red Heart
data.dec: Use it to exchange for items at the event shop in the Lucky Gashapon event.

data.name: Bingo coin
data.dec: Used to participate in the Magic Bingo event.

data.name: Bingo Point
data.dec: Used to exchange for items in the Magic Bingo event.

data.name: Griffin Sword Shard
data.dec: High ATK, high Crit rate, and high Crit DMG.

data.name: Magic Dagger Shard
data.dec: High ATK SPD, high Crit rate, and high single-target DMG.

data.name: Wing Bow Shard
data.dec: Long ATK Range, Scatter Shot, Piercing.

data.name: Dart Shard
data.dec: Bounces and attacks multiple targets with high Crit rate.

data.name: Wizard Hat Shard
data.dec: Wizard Hats amplify ATK for magic weapons.

data.name: Dragonskin Gauntlet Shard
data.dec: Shield, increases physical ATK SPD.

data.name: Icebound Magic Staff Shard
data.dec: SPD Down Control, Freeze.

data.name: Magic Potion Shard
data.dec: Poison, AoE DMG.

data.name: Can pierce enemies within a large range and attack multiple times.
data.dec: Can pierce enemies within a large range and attack multiple times.

data.name: Can pierce enemies within a large range and inflict physical wound.
data.dec: Can pierce enemies within a large range and inflict physical wound.

data.name: Fireball Shard
data.dec: Deals DMG within a large range with high Crit rate.

data.name: Thunder Staff Shard
data.dec: Deals AoE DMG multiple times and inflicts magic wound.

data.name: Scarf Shard
data.dec: HP Restoration, First Aid

data.name: Hourglass Shard
data.dec: Has a chance to restore HP, slow the target, and reduce the target's hit odds.

data.name: Wand Box Shard
data.dec: Randomly deals AoE DMG and inflicts repulse and stun effects.

data.name: Broomstick Shard
data.dec: AoE DMG, Slow

data.name: Magic Cloak Shard
data.dec: Shield, DMG RED

data.name: Magic Ring Shard
data.dec: HP Restoration, Crit Bonus

data.name: Crystal Ball Shard
data.dec: Can bounce multiple times.

data.name: Trident Shard
data.dec: Deals AoE DMG and DoT.

data.name: Ancient Wand Shard
data.dec: Piercing, Control, AoE DMG
